scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --no-recreate backend >/dev/null && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend sh -lc 'cd /app && ruff check .'
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --no-recreate backend >/dev/null && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend python scripts/migrate.py
scripts.test:backend: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --no-recreate backend >/dev/null && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend sh -lc 'cd /app && PYTHONPATH=/app pytest tests -v'
scripts.test:backend:cov: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --no-recreate backend >/dev/null && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend sh -lc 'cd /app && PYTHONPATH=/app pytest tests --cov=app --cov-config=.coveragerc --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml -q'
scripts.test:backend:cov:enforced: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --no-recreate backend >/dev/null && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend sh -lc 'cd /app && PYTHONPATH=/app pytest tests --cov=app --cov-config=.coveragerc --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml --cov-fail-under=55 -q'
scripts.dev:
printf 'Argus local services:
- Frontend: http://localhost:3000
- API: http://localhost:8000
- API Docs: http://localhost:8000/docs

' && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up
scripts.dev:up:
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --force-recreate db redis && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --force-recreate backend && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --force-recreate frontend scanner && printf '
Argus local services:
- Frontend: http://localhost:3000
- API: http://localhost:8000
- API Docs: http://localhost:8000/docs
'
scripts.dev:rebuild:
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build && printf '
Argus local services:
- Frontend: http://localhost:3000
- API: http://localhost:8000
- API Docs: http://localhost:8000/docs
'
scripts.dev:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f backend frontend scanner
scripts.prod:logs: docker compose logs -f backend frontend scanner
scripts.rebuild:frontend: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml build frontend
scripts.rebuild:backend: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml build backend scanner
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run test && npm run build
